# Vision manifest — AI-Mail vision companion

- **vision:** [ai-mail-foundation-vision.md](../ai-mail-foundation-vision.md)
- **built:** 2026-07-09 (fingerprint of the now-current working-tree vision — the vision-diff re-run baseline)

Per-ID fingerprint of the frozen vision: one row per stable ID (`S`/`V`/`UC`/`BV`),
the hash taken over that ID's source block (its anchor line up to the next stable ID,
`### S# —` section headers included as boundaries), via `git hash-object --stdin`.
Lets the next re-run diff **which** vision items changed and scope itself to their closure.

This baseline differs from the prior `temp1-reference` manifest (commit c7ce833) in
exactly two ways:

1. **18 UCs are genuine content edits** — UC3, UC4, UC15, UC21, UC28, UC29, UC48, UC50,
   UC58, UC59, UC64, UC68, UC82, UC88, UC96, UC99, UC101, UC111.
2. The entire `## Use-cases` section was **re-spaced** — a blank line was inserted between
   every UC list item. Because each UC's source block runs from its anchor up to the next
   stable ID, that inserted separator falls inside the preceding block, so **89 further UC
   blocks changed hash by whitespace only, with no content change**.

All `S#`/`V#`/`BV#` blocks are **byte-identical** to `temp1-reference`.
